content:
If no one sees it, what’s the point? Will this—what we’re doing today, right now—come out or remain in the dark?

Are you recording this right now? Why record this useless material? We’re not even being honest right now.

I’m not camera ready. Nor do i think I’ll ever be.
context: From document: Up The Hill Backwards — chunk 5 (chunk 5/5)
